title: Hypixel Skyblock 3D Weapon Models
description: Adds 3D models for certain weapons based on their FurfSky textures. REQUIRES FIRMAMENT
body:
## Requires [Firmament](https://modrinth.com/mod/firmament)!

This resource pack adds 3D models for certain Hypixel Skyblock weapons based on their textures from the [FurfSky](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/furfsky-reborn) texture pack. Don't expect models for every weapon, I'm just doing this for fun `¯\_(ツ)_/¯`

All models & textures were made by me using [Blockbench](https://www.blockbench.net).

In the order that the models were created,
### the currently modeled items are:
- Aspect of the End
- (Warped) Aspect of the End
- Raider Sword
- Aspect of the Dragon
- Frosty the Snow Cannon
- Frosty the Snow Blaster
- Hyperion


![Aspect of the End in 3D](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/add2ffde113a05ccf0d99f195d7d895f6304e6e1.gif)
